activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Only receipt is shown during scoring; post-attempt feedback names observed evidence and competency, not answers or canonical source.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints are unavailable; requesting instruction exits scoring and routes the learner to remediation.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Every miss routes to a smaller model, faded parallel task, and different secured item before evidence can update.

interactions.title: Analyze prerequisite structure
interactions.learnerAction: Identify complete boundaries, parsed relationships, and one forbidden parent-child case in unfamiliar source.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored structural analysis is submitted.

evidence.observable: Response retrieves prior concepts accurately before syntax diagnosis.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Prerequisite structural misconception.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to prior-module parallel remediation.

interactions.title: Map source to DOM
interactions.learnerAction: Map unfamiliar opening tags, closing tags, elements, text, and comments to parsed nodes or no separate node.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored source-DOM map is submitted.

evidence.observable: All source ranges map to the correct parsed objects.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Tags and nodes treated one-for-one.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to a different source-DOM mapping model.

interactions.title: Predict serialization variation
interactions.learnerAction: Predict stable nodes and changed serialization after valid quote, case, whitespace, and attribute-order changes.
interactions.artifactChange: Four scored predictions are submitted.

evidence.observable: Response separates source spelling from parsed identity and properties.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel form uses different source variations.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Byte equality assumed between source and DOM.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to parsed-property comparison practice.

interactions.title: Predict void and slash behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Predict nodes and following content for normal, void, slash, invented-end-tag, and changed-sibling cases.
interactions.artifactChange: Five scored syntax predictions are submitted.

evidence.observable: Predictions follow HTML void content models and real normal-element boundaries.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel form changes all element names and siblings.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Universal self-closing slash assumption.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to normal-versus-void contrast practice.

interactions.title: Author valid void syntax
interactions.learnerAction: Author a brief-required void element with valid placement and attributes without copied source.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored void fragment is submitted.

evidence.observable: Parsed node, parent, sibling, attributes, and no-child behavior pass.
evidence.changedCase: Server changes surrounding content and attribute value.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Void syntax present without correct semantic placement.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to faded void construction with new content.

interactions.title: Label attribute grammar
interactions.learnerAction: Label owner start tag, whitespace, names, separators, quotes, values, and closing boundary in unfamiliar source.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored grammar annotation is submitted.

evidence.observable: Every syntax part is correctly bounded and owned.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Attribute parts misplaced or merged.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to start-tag reconstruction practice.

interactions.title: Repair malformed attributes
interactions.learnerAction: Minimally repair missing quotes, duplicate names, merged attributes, and end-tag attribute text while preserving values.
interactions.artifactChange: Four scored malformed fragments are repaired.

evidence.observable: Parser and exact property-map checks pass after minimal repairs.
evidence.changedCase: Server changes values and attribute order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Broad rewrite or wrong parsed property retained.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to token-property diagnosis on a different fragment.

interactions.title: Predict boolean and keyword states
interactions.learnerAction: Predict behavior for absent, present false-spelled, valid, invalid, empty, and missing attribute states.
interactions.artifactChange: Six scored value-state predictions are submitted.

evidence.observable: Presence and defined keyword contracts determine behavior.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel form uses different boolean and enumerated attributes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One truthiness rule applied to all values.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to contract-first state comparison.

interactions.title: Author mixed value contracts
interactions.learnerAction: Author boolean, enumerated, token-list, identifier, URL, and text values for unfamiliar requirements.
interactions.artifactChange: Six scored attribute fragments are submitted.

evidence.observable: Every owner, parsed value, valid state, and behavior passes.
evidence.changedCase: Server supplies valid alternate values for all contracts.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Generic string handling or wrong attribute owner.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route missed contract to faded parallel authoring.

interactions.title: Defend value behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Defend two contrasting value contracts using missing, invalid, and changed behavior rather than serialized appearance.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored value-contract defense is submitted.

evidence.observable: Defense cites contract-specific observed behavior and limits.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All values described as strings without consumer semantics.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to a new contract-comparison defense.

interactions.title: Judge comment privacy
interactions.learnerAction: Identify safe and unsafe comments and every source, DOM, saved-file, and download surface where data remains inspectable.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored privacy judgment is submitted.

evidence.observable: Response rejects comments as secret storage and preserves safe author notes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Non-rendering comment assumed confidential.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to source-inspection privacy remediation.

interactions.title: Author exact reserved text
interactions.learnerAction: Author supplied text with ambiguous reserved characters so DOM text is exact without unintended markup or needless escaping.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored exact-text fragment is submitted.

evidence.observable: DOM text is exact and parser output has no unintended elements.
evidence.changedCase: Server supplies a different ambiguous text case.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Text altered, accidental markup, or blanket references.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to context-specific character parsing practice.

interactions.title: Predict browser recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Predict nodes, properties, and relationships for missing boundary, invalid parent, duplicate attribute, and slash cases.
interactions.artifactChange: Four scored recovery maps are submitted.

evidence.observable: Predictions match server parser evidence and identify causal tokens.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel form moves every defect.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Recovery guessed from preview appearance.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to authored-versus-parsed mapping practice.

interactions.title: Repair parser root causes
interactions.learnerAction: Minimally repair boundary, parentage, and duplicate-property defects while preserving unfamiliar content.
interactions.artifactChange: Three scored repaired fragments are submitted.

evidence.observable: Authored and parsed structure and property maps agree after bounded edits.
evidence.changedCase: Server inserts new siblings, items, and values.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Symptom masking or wholesale rewrite.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route each cause to separate debugging remediation.

interactions.title: Diagnose integrated source defects
interactions.learnerAction: Diagnose void, attribute, value, comment, character, and recovery defects before editing one unfamiliar fragment.
interactions.artifactChange: Six scored causal diagnoses are submitted.

evidence.observable: Every diagnosis names source cause, parsed effect, and relevant contract.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel form changes defects and content values.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Symptoms listed without token, property, or tree cause.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route misses to concept-specific diagnosis tasks.

interactions.title: Build an unfamiliar syntax artifact
interactions.learnerAction: Build and save a compact notice using all syntax concepts while preserving complete elements and valid relationships.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored independent notice and source-DOM evidence are submitted.

evidence.observable: Reloaded source passes parser, property, text, privacy, and relationship checks.
evidence.changedCase: Server changes content, values, siblings, and reserved text.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Copied source shape or stale unsaved evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route failed concepts before a different build brief.

interactions.title: Repair cumulative regression
interactions.learnerAction: Repair a syntax mutation that breaks complete boundaries, tree relationships, or content models without reverting valid new behavior.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored cumulative repair is submitted.

evidence.observable: Prior invariants and new syntax behavior pass together.
evidence.changedCase: A second server mutation tests the same prior rule.

interactions.feedbackTarget: New syntax retained at the expense of earlier correctness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route to cumulative correction with another mutation.

interactions.title: Defend source mastery evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Defend the saved artifact, one causal repair, one privacy decision, one changed case, and limits of demonstrated skill.
interactions.artifactChange: A scored evidence defense closes the attempt.

evidence.observable: Defense cites artifact behavior, correction, mutation, and honest evidence limits.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Mastery claim based on completion count or source tokens.
interactions.correctionRoute: Route unsupported claims to parallel evidence tasks.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.
Learner-facing copy, starters, executable browser checks, canonical answers, and learner-pilot evidence remain unauthored.
